title: dicliptera foetida var. ghatica
intro: Dicliptera foetida var. ghatica, also known as Ghatica, is a plant species that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ghatica include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin diseases, as well as aiding in digestion and respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, Ghatica is often used to make decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are consumed orally or applied topically to reap its health benefits.
